prompt: I have this financial model and I want to understand the sensitivity. What happens to Year 3 EBITDA if revenue growth drops from 10% to 5%? And then what if COGS efficiency also goes from 1% improvement per year to 0.5%?
assertions: Reports EBITDA_Y3 for at least three states: base case (~$2.877M), scenario 1 (~$2.426M), scenario 2 (~$2.315M)
Quantifies the dollar delta: revenue growth alone costs ~$451K in Y3 EBITDA (-15.7%)
Identifies that revenue growth is the dominant driver (~80% of total EBITDA decline)
All reported values come from the model's formula engine, not internal arithmetic
The compound scenario correctly layers both changes simultaneously
